title: Combination Drill and Tap Bit Set,Titanium Coated Tapping Bit Tool 13pcs SAE/Metric Screw tap Drill bit for Drilling Tapping, Countersinking,with Quick Change Adapter
features: Wide Application: The taps drill bits is mulit-function, three-in-one operation, which can drill, tap, deburr and counter holes on copper, brass, aluminum, metal sheet and plastic at the same time

Superior Craftsmanship: The taps are made of high speed steel, which can ensure sharp, fast execution and retain strength and efficiency. The surface is treated with a titanium alloy, which greatly improves the cutting performance of the drill, is more wear-resistant and prolongs the service life

High efficiency: Drilling & Tapping & Countersinking is three-in-one operation at the same time, so as to quickly , complete work completely, greatly save processing steps and time costs, and improve work efficiency

What you got:13PCS SIZES&PREMIUM SERVICE Can be used to tap various threads. 6PC SAE: 6-32NC, 8-32NC, 10-24NC, 10-32NC, 12-24NC, 1/4-20NC; 6 metric：M3 x 0.5, M4 x 0.7, M5 x 0.8, M6 x 1.0, M8 x 1.25, M10 x 1.5; 1 piece-quick change adapter

Machine: The set includes SAE and metric sizes, so it has high versatility. Each tap drill is engraved with a label, which is convenient for you to choose the size that suits you. The convenient 录-inch (6.35mm) hex shank suitable for most Electric drill, bench drill, drill press and Tapping machine
description: Product Description Titanium Nitride Coated (TiN) The surface is treated with Titanium Nitride, significantly enhancing the drill's cutting performance, wear resistance, and service life. Quick Change Adapter Maximize efficiency with the included quick change adapter that allows you to switch between different sizes easily. Size 6PC SAE: 6-32NC, 8-32NC, 10-24NC, 10-32NC, 12-24NC, 1/4-20NC; 6 metric：M3 x 0.5, M4 x 0.7, M5 x 0.8, M6 x 1.0, M8 x 1.25, M10 x 1.5; 1 piece-quick change adapter Combination Application They are three-in-one operation, which can drill, tap, deburr and counter holes on wood, copper, brass, aluminum, sheet metal and plastic. One-step processing, save steps and time costs, improve working efficiency. Deepening the chip flute helps to remove chips on the tap, reducing friction and heat
